purpose: Registry of LocalAI application deployment profiles used after cluster validation and before benchmark execution.
governanceRules: Application deployment profiles are operational configuration artifacts and must not contain local provider secrets.
Provider-backed application deployment must run only after cluster validation reaches an accepted status unless an explicit dry-run or recovery override is used.
Deployment logs, manifests, snapshots, and smoke-test outputs must be written under the cycle-specific results tree.
Benchmark execution must not start when LocalAI deployment or smoke validation fails.
Application deployment profiles must resolve placement profiles explicitly before placement-sensitive comparisons are executed.
Runtime campaign variants must be generated from application deployment templates rather than from concrete baseline profiles.

runtimeGeneratedProfilePolicy.rationale: Campaign-variant application deployment profiles are generated from the template so each variant can bind its own infrastructure, placement, kubeconfig and output roots without duplicating static profile files.
